global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on food-related offers.
global.main_message: Promoting late-night food deals through an app.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A mockup of an app interface with a simple layout, featuring a vertical rectangle with rounded edges.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Hungry? We got you' is prominently displayed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main offer reads 'Late-night deals available', providing more context.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with white text saying 'Claim reward' is positioned at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'QuickFork' is displayed in bold text at the top left corner, establishing brand identity.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Late-night deals available

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' is positioned at the top right, highlighting a promotional offer.
